required_skills: Environment art creation covering modular architecture sets, natural landscapes, props, and large-scale world building for games
Modular asset design and kit-bash workflows for efficient, scalable environment construction with minimal draw call overhead
Terrain sculpting and landscape painting using Unreal Landscape tools or Unity Terrain for natural and urban ground surfaces
PBR material creation for environment surfaces including tiling materials, decals, vertex blend materials, and terrain layers
Lighting and atmosphere setup using real-time dynamic lighting, baked lightmaps, and sky atmosphere systems within game engines
Level dressing and composition skills to create visually compelling, readable spaces that support gameplay flow and player navigation
Asset optimization for large-scale environments including occlusion culling setup, LOD management, and texture streaming configuration
Proficiency in Autodesk Maya or Blender for environment prop and modular set modeling alongside Substance Painter for texturing
preferred_skills: Procedural environment generation using Houdini and Houdini Engine plugins for scattering, road generation, and asset placement
World machine or Gaea terrain generation for high-resolution heightmap creation used as a base for in-engine landscape sculpting
Photogrammetry scanning and integration using RealityCapture or Metashape for photorealistic ground surface and rock asset creation
HLOD (Hierarchical Level of Detail) and World Partition systems in Unreal Engine 5 for large open-world streaming environments
Foliage and vegetation system setup using Unreal Foliage Tool or SpeedTree for dense, believable natural environments
Destruction and physical material setup using Chaos Physics (Unreal) or NVIDIA Blast for destructible environment elements
Experience shipping environment art for open-world, linear, or multiplayer games at a AAA or AA studio level
responsibilities: Build large-scale, immersive game environments by designing and assembling modular architectural and natural asset kits that balance visual quality with runtime performance
Sculpt and paint terrain and landscape layers in Unreal Engine or Unity, creating geographically convincing ground surfaces with proper material blending, erosion detail, and readable silhouettes
Create PBR-compliant tiling surface materials, vertex blend shaders, and decal materials in Substance Designer and Substance Painter that support varied, non-repetitive environment surfaces
Dress and compose game levels by placing, scaling, and rotating assets to craft visually interesting spaces that guide player attention and reinforce narrative setting
Establish and implement environment lighting using Unreal Sky Atmosphere, directional lights, and local fill lights to achieve targeted mood, time-of-day, and visual style goals
Design and implement foliage and vegetation ecosystems using SpeedTree assets and Unreal Foliage Tool, balancing visual density with GPU performance on target platforms
Optimize environment scenes to meet performance budgets by configuring LOD chains, enabling Hierarchical LOD (HLOD), managing texture streaming pools, and auditing draw call counts
Develop procedural environment workflows in Houdini Engine to automate road networks, asset scattering, and modular building generation for rapid large-scale world population
Collaborate with level designers to ensure environment art supports intended gameplay flow, cover placement, navigation clarity, and scripted set-piece moments
Conduct self-directed quality reviews by evaluating environment art under final in-game lighting conditions and camera perspectives, iterating until assets meet approved visual targets
